title: [NTGL] NukaTeam's Gun Lib
description: Allows you to add animated weapons to the game
body:
## NukaTeam's Gun Lib
**Warning: This mod requires [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) and [Framework](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework)**

NTGL is a powerful library based on MrCrayfish's gun mod, that allows you to add various types of animated weapons to the game: guns, melee weapons, grenades and throwables.

You can add new weapons or edit existing ones using gun packs, more info on [NTGL wiki](https://github.com/Jetug/NukaTeamGunLib/wiki)

## Features:
- Gun pack system
- Dual wielding
- Customisable weapon hud
- Switching between ammo types
- Fire mode selection
- Death effects 
- Living entities can use guns
- Build-in projectile types: bullet, laser, electric, flame, missile, grenade
